title: Connector, connector assembly, and retainer
abstract: To provide a connector capable of appropriately attaching a retainer to a housing while reliably arranging a cable terminal at an appropriate position even when a clearance between members is reduced in order to reduce the size of the connector. A cable terminal20has a first stopped part24a. A retainer40has a positioning post41positioned in a rearward direction from the first stopped part24aof the cable terminal20and restricting movement of the cable terminal20in a rearward direction. The positioning post41is elastically deformable to move in a forward-rearward direction.
claims: 1. A connector, comprising: a cable terminal having a first stopped part; a housing having a terminal storage chamber, a front stopper part in the terminal storage chamber, and a part to be engaged, the terminal storage chamber defining an open rear end through which the cable terminal is inserted in a forward direction for storage within the terminal storage chamber; and a retainer including a positioning post and an engaging part, wherein the positioning post includes a post base part having a front end and an opposite rear end, a first extending part extending downward from the post base part and a second extending part extending linearly in the forward direction from the first extending part and terminating in a front end, wherein the first extending part is configured to elastically deform such that the second extending part is configured to move in a plane defined by the forward direction, an opposite rearward direction, a left direction and a right direction, the left and right directions being orthogonal to the forward and rearward directions, wherein the engaging part is coupled to the post base part and configured to engage with the part to be engaged of the housing, wherein the second extending part is inserted in the forward direction into the terminal storage chamber through the open rear end of the housing and is engaged with the first stopped part of the cable terminal, and the retainer is attached to the housing by engagement of the engaging part and the part to be engaged, and wherein movement of the cable terminal in the terminal storage chamber in the forward direction is restricted by the front stopper part, and wherein the front end of the second extending part contacts the first stopped part and the first extending part is configured to elastically deform to provide for movement of the first extending part only in the plane and thereby restricting movement of the cable terminal in the rearward direction when the retainer is attached to the housing by engagement of the engaging part engages with the part to be engaged.
